title: Row order permutation only
root_cause: Rows are permuted while value set is unchanged.
fairness_risk: Hash-only drift checks can treat semantically equivalent tables as breakage.
injection_note: Permuted row order only (same value set).

title: Sub-femtoscale numeric jitter
root_cause: Tiny floating-point perturbation is below practical analysis tolerance.
fairness_risk: Bit-level comparisons can flag negligible noise as reproducibility failure.

title: Untracked external factor file drift
root_cause: A local file outside OmicsLake changes and influences recomputation.
fairness_risk: Drift is detectable, but root-cause attribution may remain coarse without explicit external dependency tracking.
injection_note: Changed external factor file and recomputed outputs (file is outside OmicsLake lineage).

title: Rollback requested without snapshot label
root_cause: No prior snapshot exists, but rollback is requested.
fairness_risk: Auto-repair cannot restore to a missing reference point.
injection_note: Injected drift without having any baseline snapshot label.

title: Random-noise recomputation without fixed seed
root_cause: Analysis includes a stochastic step with no seed management.
fairness_risk: Tool should still detect drift and allow rollback when snapshots exist.
injection_note: Recomputed with stochastic noise and no fixed seed.
